languages.title: Təlam
languages.subtitle: Təlam do app sammason faidatin dəga karne.

phone.label: Lamba wayabe
phone.searchCountry: Lardə kulasne, lamba, au prefix bowotəye
phone.invalid: Lamba wayabe lardə kartənadəbe kalkaldə yike.

auth.onboardingTagline: Nǝlefa kǝlanǝmbe loktuwa kate “Wu nganyi” kuru “Bana mǝradǝngǝna.”
auth.createSubtitle: Duwal sign-inbe karne graph nəlefabe nzəliwo nankaro.
auth.signInFailedMessage: Andeye raknǝm gagǝye tamonyiyen. Connectionnǝmdǝ kulasne kuru waltǝ jarabne.
auth.googleUnavailableMessage: Zaman fuwutə fatobe faidatə. Native Google Sign-In də cida gar fuwutəye lan cidajin.
auth.northStarSubtitle: Pair kərma au goza kozəna kuru dare yira.
auth.northStarBody: Shi VL01 wearabledǝ raksǝ nǝlefa suwudin taps-a kuru alama kuruwu-a lan.
auth.meetCapybearSubtitle: Sawanəm nəlefabe kəla mapben kuru suro bowotəben.
auth.capybearBody: Capybear raksə banazəyin futu fatobe-a, futu gartəma-a, futu azallatabe-a, uzur bowotə-a, kuru bana kowo-a.

permissions.locationSubtitle: Map-a, na tajirwa-a, nəlefa-a, kuru SOS-a nankaro faidatin.
permissions.locationBody: VeryLoving na gojin sau am gartəmasoye asuzayin na bana məradətənadə. Rangnǝm shi adǝga faltin darelan suro Settingsben.
permissions.notificationsSubtitle: Wartǝgǝdǝ banazǝyin check-ins-a kuru lamarra azallatabe-a.
permissions.notificationsBody: Andeye bas warmatǝgǝdǝ faidatǝyen nasha nǝlefabe-a, bǝlintǝ azallatabe-a, kuru taktǝgǝram nyiye yita gattǝgǝma-a.
permissions.locationRationaleMessage: VeryLoving nanəm faidatə map nəlefabe-a, na tajirwabe-a, duwaro yayaktə-a, kuru SOS awo surodən dagəna-aro. Rangnǝm shi adǝga faltin darelan suro Settingsben.
permissions.notificationsRationaleMessage: VeryLoving ye taktəwa gawo-a, awowa azallataro bəlintəgə-a, kuru awowa nəlefaye yitagattəgə-a zuzəyin. Andeye notifications faidatǝnyi ads ro.
permissions.microphoneRationaleMessage: VeryLoving də microphone lan faidatin sa AI companion au safety bowotə badijiya bas.
permissions.bluetoothRationaleMessage: VeryLoving Bluetooth faidatə zaye NorthStar'a kəljin, kəndaram kəltəye kərajin, kuru awo təkkindən nəlefa suwudin.
permissions.cameraRationaleMessage: VeryLoving uses the camera only to scan the one-time pairing QR code on your home robot.

tutorial.sharedBody: VeryLoving dəye letəram adəga Settings-a dashboard-a lan tuwondin.
tutorial.chooseVoiceSubtitle: Kowo companionbe do fantəro ngəlaro fanjinmadə karne.
tutorial.homeSubtitle: Nǝlefa kunbalinbe nankaro kulashi kǝla kǝllǝm.
tutorial.emergencySubtitle: Tap uwu raksə SOS ro waljin kuru alama gartəmayero waljin.
tutorial.excuseSubtitle: Dalil ngəla kəndaram kuttu koltəbe kudo.
tutorial.safetyCallSubtitle: Sa bana məradəzəna lan bowotə loktu zahirye badine.

jewelry.pairSubtitle: Zawadǝ karǝngǝn gǝnane loktu scanning lan.
jewelry.scanStartFailed: Bluetooth scanning də baditin ba. Martǝne waltǝ jarabne.
jewelry.scanFailed: Andeye awo nzayebe karǝngǝn tuwondǝnyi. Bluetooth kulasne, NorthStar dəga zakkatə, kuru waltə jarabne.
jewelry.scanAccessFailed: Bluetooth scanning də baditin ba. Bluetooth access dəga kulasne kuru waltə jarabne.
jewelry.permissionDenied: Naura-karǝngǝbe fandonzǝ ba. Suro Settingsben Bluetooth-ga kolzǝ, daji waltǝ jarabne.
jewelry.connectTimeout: NorthStar loktu nguwu gozəna kəltəro. Karǝngǝne kuru waltǝ jarabne.
jewelry.connectFailed: Andeye raknǝm NorthStar-a kǝlnyenba. Charge təna kuru karəngənro wune, daji waltə jarabne.
jewelry.emptyMessage: NorthStar charged lan rowotə kuru waya adəga karəngən, daji waltə scanned.

home.subtitle: Nǝlefa dashboardbe
home.readyBody: Kowo-a, taswira-a, nzaye-a, kuru gartəwu-adə tap fallan kara.

map.title: Map nəlefabe
map.previewSubtitle: Expo Go futu kurube; Mapbox suro gar fuwutəben fəlejin.
map.updateFailed: Andeye raknǝm nanǝmdǝga bǝlinnyiyenba. Martǝne waltǝ jarabne.
map.notRequested: Na fando mǝradǝtǝnyi. Rangnǝm shiga darelan Settings lan sǝdin.
map.permissionOff: Na fandodə ba. Settings lan faidatə map nəlewabe dəga dawudən gənatəro.
map.timeout: Na nyiye loktu nguwu gojin təmatəna kozənaro. Na laa alamaram fetero lenəmin kuru waltə jarabne.
map.savedEmptyMessage: Nawa kasatkata gənatənadə na allan fəlejin duwaro fando nankaro.
map.geofenceEntered: You entered the %{radius}m saved-place safety zone.
map.geofenceExited: You left the %{radius}m saved-place safety zone.

safetyCall.emptyMessage: Bowotə badine au kawuli ruwotə loktu dawartəna lan.

history.clearMessage: Adəye kawuliwa companionbe AI suro naura adəben gənatənadə sutuluyin.
history.title: Gargam zandebe
history.subtitle: AI kawuliwa companionbe naura allan gənatəna.
history.emptyMessage: Zandewa AI sawa-nəmyedə na allan fəlejin ngawo bowonəm buro salakbedən.
history.loadFailed: Andeye muwonzǝ gargam zandeye loadnyiyen ba. Martǝne waltǝ jarabne.
history.clearFailed: Andeye raknǝm gargam zandebe dǝga cinba. Martǝne waltǝ jarabne.
history.deleteFailed: Andeye raknǝm zande adǝga cinba. Martǝne waltǝ jarabne.

voices.title: Kowowa bowotəye nəlefabe
voices.subtitle: Kowo companionbe do fantəro kalkalro fantənadə karne.
voices.sampleFailedMessage: Samfuri kowobe adə raktə yitagattəyinba. Martǝne waltǝ jarabne.

settings.offlineModeSubtitle: Jaawuwa companionbe bundled faidatə loktu network au Hume shaidawa mbejiro waljiya.
settings.privacyBody: Bayanna fatobe kəla naura adəben gənatənadə sutuluwu au cin.
settings.exportFailedMessage: Kǝrma dǝro data nǝm ngǝlanǝm sutuluyin ba.
settings.deleteConfirmMessage: Adəye profilenəm-a, futu-a, kəla kəltəram azallata-a, gargam zande-a, taktə-a izini-a, kuru loktu auth fatobe-a suro naura adəben sutuluyin.
settings.deleteFailedMessage: Kǝrma dǝro bayan fatobe dǝga cintǝyin ba.

sections.deviceSafetySubtitle: NorthStar, gartəmaso, kuru am azallataro notəmaso

settings.updateFailedMessage: Andeye raknǝm awo mǝradǝtǝna dǝga gǝnanyiyen ba. Martǝne waltǝ jarabne.
settings.signOutFailedMessage: Sessionnǝmdǝ kuwamiyayi cidajin. Martǝne waltǝ jarabne.

contacts.title: Kǝltǝram azallatabe
contacts.subtitle: Am kasatkata mbeji loktu nəlewaben.
contacts.name: Su
contacts.emptyMessage: Kam do ne kasattəna dəga kəlne sandiye dawartəna loktu do ne safety flow ye sandiya məradəzəna lan.
contacts.removeMessage: Kam adə suro awo təmatəyen fəlejinba.
contacts.nameRequired: Su kam do ne kǝlanzǝn gǝnatǝna dǝga yike.
contacts.saveFailedMessage: Andeye raknǝm kǝla kǝl adǝga gǝnanyiyenba. Bayannadə kulasne kuru waltə jarabne.
contacts.removeFailedMessage: Andeye raknǝm kǝla kǝl adǝga tutuluyinba. Martǝne waltǝ jarabne.

friends.title: Sawa
friends.subtitle: Gardians, awo məradətəna, kuru graph azallatabe.
friends.emptyMessage: Sawa-a kuru gartəwu-a kasatkatadə na allan fəlezayin loktu sandiya kəlzaiya.

emergency.title: Tǝmatǝram SOS
emergency.subtitle: Escalate də sa bana kəla kəltəyen məradəzəna lan bas.
emergency.body: Adəye nəlefa letəgəramnəm nozəyin kuru awo kəla azallatayen dawarjin.
emergency.addContact: Settings lan bayan kəla awowa tədinma yira.
emergency.quickShareMessage: Na-a yayaktəbe stubdə dawartəna. Na datəgəram sharebedə kəlne kəltəram livebe zutəro.

capybearTap.title: Capybear tap
capybearTap.subtitle: NorthStar nǝm indiro tapne lemun nǝlefabe gǝnatǝro.
capybearTap.body: Diwal gesturebedə waya BLEbe nankaro dawartəna.

errors.voiceOffline: Nyi alama offline yeyi. Kawulinǝmdǝ zuwatin loktu waltǝm kǝltǝmiya.
errors.voiceQueued: Kawuli gənatəna. Sa kowo companion də waltə kəljiya shiga zuzayin.
errors.microphone: Microphone lan faidatə kowo lan bowotin. Rangnǝm Settings lan sǝdin, au kawuli ruwojin.
errors.billing: Shi kowo intanettedǝ loktu ganalagǝro tuwondinba. Rangnǝm gozagǝ kowom offline lan.
errors.authentication: Sawa kowobedə raksə loktu adəga tawatsəyinba. Waltǝ gagǝne au kǝrmagǝro offline companiondǝ faidatǝne.
errors.timeout: Sawa kowobedə loktu ngəwu gozə jaawuwa cin. Connectionnǝmdǝ kulasne kuru waltǝ jarabne.
errors.network: Andeye raknǝm sawa kowobedǝga nazǝnyiyenba. Kǝlanǝmma kulasne, daji waltǝ jarabne au offline lan gowom kowom.
errors.genericVoice: Awolagǝye kowo bowotǝdǝga tarzǝna. Waltǝ jarabne, au sawa offlinebedǝga gowom kowom.

ios.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: VeryLovingdǝ microphone fando mǝradǝzǝna kǝla nǝlefa-a kuru AI sawa-a bowotǝro.
ios.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: VeryLoving nanǝm faidatin map nǝlefabe-a kuru awowa nǝlefabe karǝngǝbe-aro.
ios.NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: VeryLoving Bluetooth faidatə awo nzəliwobe NorthStar dəga kəljin.
ios.NSCameraUsageDescription: VeryLoving uses the camera only to scan the one-time pairing QR code on your home robot.

releaseCritical.authUnavailable: Nduro kasattəwurambe adə gina adəlan mbejiwawo.
releaseCritical.demoModeNotice: Misal ngal adə bayin karya na adəbe duwon faidatə. Jaman haɗamtə mbejiwawo, sa app-a yade session adə təmmaro fattəna.
releaseCritical.authCodeInvalid: Lambar tabbatəram adə jussuwawo wala waatə kəɗi. Lambar bərniro roji, yade fadi.
releaseCritical.authRateLimited: Nduro kəltəram ngəwuje. Kəla cin nəm, yade fadi.
releaseCritical.authTimeout: Tabbatəram ndurobe waati ngəwu cije. Hade nəm fakkaji, yade fadi.
releaseCritical.authNetwork: Jaman ndurobe rokko ngəltəwawo. Hade nəm fakkaji, yade fadi.
releaseCritical.authSessionExpired: Session nəm waatə kəɗi. Bərniro nduro kasatti.
releaseCritical.mapUnavailable: Taswir amannabe yaktəwawo. Hade nəm fakkaji, yade fadi.
releaseCritical.mapCachedLocation: Na kərma mbejiwawo. Na nəm suro %{capturedAt}lan saptəna cikka.
releaseCritical.locationShareFailed: Na nəm samatəwawo. Izinin na fakkaji, yade fadi.
releaseCritical.locationShareCached: Na ani saptəna cikka suro %{capturedAt}lan ruwotəna adə:
releaseCritical.blePermission: Izinin Bluetooth dəptəna. Suro Settings lan kaji, yade fadi.
releaseCritical.bleUnavailable: Haɗaptə Bluetooth masin adəlan wala gina adəlan mbejiwawo.
releaseCritical.bleScanFailed: NorthStar fandəwawo. Kəla nəm kəleji, Bluetooth fakkaji, yade fadi.
releaseCritical.bleNoDevices: Masin NorthStar kəla nəmba fandəwawo. Kəla nəm kəleji, yade ceji.
releaseCritical.bleConnectFailed: NorthStar ro haɗaptəwawo. Caji, kəla nəm kəleji, yade fadi.
releaseCritical.sosContactRequired: Am huwəram gaggawube mbejiwawo; boworam gənatəwawo.
releaseCritical.voiceConfiguration: Abal sawube kərma mbejiwawo. Gade yade fadi wala abal offline be faidaji.

medicalProfile.title: Emergency medical profile
medicalProfile.subtitle: Information you choose to share during an SOS
medicalProfile.description: Keep this information current. VeryLoving attaches it only to a connected SOS after you enable sharing; it is not sent through the phone call itself.
medicalProfile.conditionsHint: Enter one per line or separate items with commas.
medicalProfile.allergiesHint: Enter one per line or separate items with commas.
medicalProfile.medicationsHint: Enter one per line: name | dose | instructions.
medicalProfile.emergencyNotesHint: Add details that may help your emergency contacts.
medicalProfile.shareLabel: Include this profile with connected SOS alerts
medicalProfile.shareHint: When enabled, reviewed details may be sent to your synchronized emergency flow.
medicalProfile.consentBody: Saving with sharing enabled records your consent and review time. You can turn sharing off or clear this profile at any time.
medicalProfile.saved: Medical profile saved and review time recorded.
medicalProfile.loadFailed: We could not load your medical profile. Try again.
medicalProfile.saveFailed: We could not save your medical profile. Check the entries and try again.
medicalProfile.clearFailed: We could not clear your medical profile. Try again.
medicalProfile.clearMessage: This removes the emergency medical information stored securely on this device.

medication.title: Medication reminders
medication.subtitle: Schedule home robot reminders and caregiver escalation.
medication.referenceHint: Use a short private schedule reference with letters, numbers, hyphens, or underscores.
medication.noRobot: Pair a home robot before adding medication reminders.
medication.escalationHint: Caregivers are alerted only if the reminder remains unacknowledged.
medication.saveFailed: We could not save this medication reminder. Check the entries and try again.
medication.loadFailed: We could not load medication reminders. Try again.
medication.acknowledgeFailed: We could not acknowledge this medication reminder. Try again.

wellness.title: Wellbeing & connected care
wellness.subtitle: Gentle activities, emotional check-ins, and coordinated device support.
wellness.connectedCareUnavailable: Connected care needs a signed-in account and the VeryLoving service. Local activities and mood history still work on this device.
wellness.scenarioFailed: Connected care could not start or update. Check your connection and try again.

cognitive.title: Cognitive engagement
cognitive.subtitle: Choose a light memory game, a trivia question, or a conversation prompt.
cognitive.connectedBody: Ask your home companion to start a gentle activity and follow its progress here.
cognitive.connectedHint: Starts the cognitive engagement scenario on your account-bound devices.
cognitive.activitySubtitle: There is no score to chase. Pick what feels comfortable today.
cognitive.emptyMessage: Memory, trivia, and conversation are ready whenever you are.

memory.title: Memory cards
memory.description: Notice three symbols, then recall the middle one.

trivia.title: Friendly trivia
trivia.description: Answer a familiar question at your own pace.

conversation.title: Conversation prompt
conversation.description: Use a warm prompt to recall and share a story.

memory.title: Remember the middle symbol
memory.instruction: Take a moment to look at this sequence.
memory.question: Which symbol was in the middle?
memory.incorrect: Good try. Take another look and go at your own pace.

trivia.title: Friendly trivia
trivia.incorrect: Not this time—and that is completely okay.

one.prompt: What color is a clear daytime sky?

two.prompt: What is the largest organ of the human body?

three.prompt: How many days are in a week?

prompts.one: What is a meal that brings back a happy memory?
prompts.two: Who taught you something you still use today?
prompts.three: What song always lifts your mood?
prompts.four: What is a place you would enjoy visiting again?

emotional.title: Emotional check-in
emotional.subtitle: Notice how you feel, save a short reflection, or invite your companion to talk.
emotional.moodQuestion: How are you feeling right now?
emotional.moodHint: Choose the closest answer. There is no wrong choice.
emotional.reflectionHint: Keep it brief. Raw voice audio and transcripts are not saved here.
emotional.reflectionPlaceholder: A few words about this moment...
emotional.privacyNote: Your mood history is account-bound, included in privacy export, and removed with account data deletion.
emotional.saveFailed: We could not save this check-in. Please try again.
emotional.connectedBody: Start a consent-aware Hume conversation through your home companion. A user-started check-in never invents a stress reading.
emotional.connectedHint: Starts an emotional check-in on your account-bound home companion.
emotional.historySubtitle: Only your last 90 private check-ins are retained on this device.
emotional.historyLoadFailed: We could not load your check-in history.
emotional.historyEmptyMessage: Choose a mood above when you are ready.
emotional.deleteMessage: This removes the mood and short reflection from this device.
emotional.deleteFailed: We could not delete this check-in. Please try again.
emotional.humeContextNotice: When you start reflection, your selected mood and optional summary are shared as temporary Hume context. They are not treated as a stress reading.

scenarios.title: Connected care scenarios
scenarios.subtitle: Coordinate your wearable and home companion with clear safety boundaries.
scenarios.connectedCareBody: VeryLoving resolves your paired devices on the server, prevents duplicate actions, and tracks every execution.
scenarios.demoOffline: Demo mode never creates a bearer token, so connected scenarios stay offline. Sign in with a real development account to test the server flow.
scenarios.signInRequired: Sign in again to use connected care scenarios.
scenarios.notConfigured: Connected care is not configured in this build.
scenarios.networkError: The connected care service could not be reached. Your wearable can still work over Bluetooth.
scenarios.stillRunning: This scenario is still running. Refresh its status shortly.
scenarios.genericError: The connected care action could not be completed. Please retry.
scenarios.chooseActionBody: Actions with safety consequences always explain what will happen before they start.

descriptions.fall_detection: Run an analytics-only practice. It never moves a robot or alerts a contact.
descriptions.medication_adherence: Ask the robot to remind you now; unconfirmed reminders can escalate to a caregiver.
descriptions.emotional_check_in: Invite a calming, consent-aware Hume conversation.
descriptions.cognitive_engagement: Invite a gentle robot activity and voice game.
descriptions.ai_angel_auto_dial: Start the confirmed cross-device emergency flow.

confirmations.practiceBody: This records a practice event only. It will not move the robot, call anyone, or send an emergency alert.
confirmations.medicationBody: The robot will remind you now. If you do not confirm within the adherence window, the configured caregiver escalation can run.
confirmations.emergencyBody: This starts the real emergency workflow across your paired devices and may contact your configured emergency contact.
confirmations.cancelCriticalBody: Stopping a critical scenario can end active emergency steps. Continue only if you are sure help is no longer needed.

scenarios.wellnessToolsBody: Check in privately or choose an activity before involving connected devices.
scenarios.recentActivityBody: Status is encrypted, account-bound, and refreshed while work is active.
scenarios.emptyMessage: Start a wellbeing check-in or another quick action when you are ready.
scenarios.started: Scenario accepted. Live status is updating.
scenarios.fallbackNote: A planned fallback completed because a preferred step was unavailable.
scenarios.failedNote: The scenario could not finish. Check device connectivity and try again if it is safe.

feedback.title: Was this helpful?
feedback.message: Tell us whether %{interaction} supported you. We save only the rating, not a free-text response.
feedback.helpfulHint: Records a thumbs-up rating for this completed interaction.
feedback.notHelpfulHint: Records a thumbs-down rating for this completed interaction.
feedback.error: We could not save your rating. Please try again.
